name: Varroc Engineering Limited
summary: Varroc Engineering Limited designs, manufactures, and supplies exterior lighting systems, plastic and polymer components, electrical and electronics components, and precision metallic components worldwide. It operates through Automotive and Others segments. The company offers unpainted and painted body parts; exterior and interior systems; seating systems; mirror systems; air filters; automotive accessories; lighting systems; instrument clusters; catalytic converters; switches; motors and magnetos; electronics; traction motors and controllers; DC-DC converters; and engine valves. It also provides precision-forged and machined parts for engine and transmissions to two-wheelers; four-cylinder crankshafts for commercial vehicles and stationary engines; and crank pins, connecting rods, flanges, ring gears, crankshafts, camshafts, knuckles, front axle beams, and hydraulic components, as well as head and signal lamps. The company serves passenger car, commercial vehicle, two-wheeler, three-wheeler, and off-highway vehicle original equipment manufacturers. Varroc Engineering Limited was founded in 1988 and is headquartered in Aurangabad, India.
